# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data
Resources:
  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abcdefg
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      InstanceType: t3.medium
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - SubnetId: subnet-12345678
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
  Volume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      Size: 10
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEbsVolume
